creator: fcsk.aim@gmail.com
text:
I installed mysql 5.7.12 on freebsd 10.3 many times, all times i get failed precmd for mysqll  , after some checks i identified the problem.
Problem is my.cnf  if i delete /usr/local/etc/mysql/my.cnf  all work fine.. mysql start.

If is necessary i upload video to see problem.
